text:

Traffic violations attract hefty fines:

• No helmet: ₹1,000
• No Parking: ₹3,000
• No insurance: ₹1,000
• Drunk driving: ₹10,000
• No Entry violation: ₹5,000
• Mobile phone while driving: ₹2,000
• No PUC certificate: ₹1,100
• Triple riding: ₹2,000

Fair enough.
